name: Standard Chartered EaseMyTrip Credit Card
exclusions: airline and hotel accelerated rewards apply on standalone websites, apps or outlets and not on aggregators
milestoneBenefits: Renewal fee reversed for clients with spends greater than or equal to INR 50,000 in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 20% instant discount on hotels and 10% off on flights on EaseMyTrip
10 reward points for every INR 100 spent at standalone hotel and airline websites/apps/outlets
Complimentary domestic lounge access – 2 per year

salaried: Applicant age should be between 18 and 65 years
selfEmployed: Applicant age should be between 18 and 67 years
